actions.value:
If you want to sell your FTM (ERC-20) you can do so by visiting Changelly.com and then selecting FTM as your deposit currency. Go through the normal steps of an exchange to sell your FTM. 

If your intentions were to receive the FTM (Opera) coin and you received FTM (ERC-20) you will need to use a “Bridge” to get your coins converted. 

To use the FTM bridge please follow these steps:

  1. Tap to go inside of your FTM wallet (the wallet that accidentally received the FTM ERC-20) and tap on the gear icon (located upper right side) and a new menu will pop up.
  2. Tap on master private key and then enter your password. From here you will have to write down the private key and you will be inputting it into MetaMask. (NOTE: Exposing your private key does come with some risk. Never store your private key digitally or share it with anyone)
  3. Now that the private key is noted please download MetaMask, the browser extension is preferred as a computer will make this experience much easier.
  4. Create an account (follow all instructions to safely backup your MetaMask account). 
  5. Once the account is created you will then tap on the Menu (typically the colored circle) and then tap “Import Wallet”.
  6. Enter the private key into MetaMask. Your token FTM ERC-20 will now show in that wallet. 
  7. You will need to add ETH to the wallet that contains your FTM ERC-20. To do so you can add from Edge by tapping “Buy” and purchasing ETH or you can acquire some from a third party, or if you already have ETH simply send some to that wallet. The correct amount of ETH depends on network congestion however around $10 should be enough. 


To use the bridge visit https://multichain.xyz/ or https://spookyswap.finance/bridge

If you’re using https://spookyswap.finance/bridge

  1. Connect your MetaMask wallet.
  2. Select your token on the left side and then select the Opera or Fantom Chain on the right side. 
  3. Next to the text “Token to Bridge”  tap MAX to send your total balance of FTM ERC-20 to exchange into FTM (Opera) now you can click “Bridge Token” 
  4. MetaMask will show a confirmation message that you will have to allow. (Note if this first confirmation doesn’t work you may need to re-initiate the transaction).

If you’re using https://multichain.xyz/

  1. Connect your meta mask and then select the ETH or ERC-20 version of Fantom as the top wallet and the FTM main net or FTM Opera as the bottom wallet. 
  2. Click on transfer and you will then see a confirmation screen show from MetaMask. Confirm the transaction

Give the process some time as it can take a long time. You can check your transaction using the transaction ID within MetaMask. You can find this in your transaction history of your ETH wallet. 

If you need any assistance or have any questions about this process please let us know.
